name: OWASP Top 10
description: Project-authored risk-category reference for web application evidence.
source_note: Category identifiers reference OWASP Top 10 2021; consult the official OWASP publication.
controls: Review evidence related to authorization boundaries.
Review evidence related to sensitive-data protection.
Review evidence of unsafe interpreter input handling.
Review design-level safeguards and misuse cases.
Review insecure defaults and configuration gaps.
Review component inventory and update evidence.
Review integrity controls for code and data.
